Test Case Title: Verify that the user is redirected to the dashboard page when providing valid credentials
Test Steps:
1- navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
2- enter valid username
3- enter valid password
4- click login button
Expected Result: user is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard page

Test Case Title: Verify that navigating to internal URLs without an active session redirects to the مogin page.
Test Steps:
1- navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com
2- enter valid username
3- enter valid password
4- click login button
5- copy the URL of the dashboard page.
6- open Edge browser and paste the URL.
Expected Result: the user is redirected to the login page on Edge browser,

Test Case Title: Verify that clicking the 'Logout' button successfully terminates the session
Pre-conditions: user is on  the dashboard page
Test Steps:
1- click on the user profile dropdown (top right).
2- click on the Logout button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged out and redirected to the Login page.

Test Case Title: Verify that log out from one browser tab invalidates the session across all other active tabs
Pre-conditions: user is on  the dashboard page on browser Tab 1.
Test Steps:
1- right-click on any menu item (e.g., 'Add Employee') and select "Open link in new tab" (Tab 2).
2- on Tab 2, click on the user profile icon and select Logout.
3- go back to Tab 1 and try to perform any action (e.g., click 'Search' or 'Employee List').
Expected Result: the system detects the session is terminated, blocks the action on Tab 1, and automatically redirects the user to the Login page.

Test Case Title: Verify that clicking the browser's 'Back' button after logging out does not restore the session
Pre-conditions: user is on  the dashboard page
Test Steps:
1- click on the user profile dropdown (top right).
2- click on the Logout button.
3- click on the browser's Back arrow button.
4- try to perform any action on the dashboard page
Expected Result: the system prevents access and the user is redirected to login page

Test Case Title: Verify that copying the dashboard URL and pasting it after logging out denies access
Pre-conditions: user is on  the dashboard page
Test Steps:
1- copy the dashboard's link
2- click logout.
3- paste the copied URL into the browser address bar and click enter.
Expected Result: the system denies unauthorized access and automatically redirects the user back to the Login page.
